status: scaffolded — gate document not yet rendered (awaiting full pilot run)

produced_artifacts_at_runtime.decision_md: outputs/analysis/pilot_decision.md (rendered by pilot_decision.py at the end of stage 7)
produced_artifacts_at_runtime.figure_preview: outputs/figures/pilot_figure_2_preview.pdf (regional benefit bar chart for one canonical pair — generated post-A6 once pilot data is in)

key_signatures.render: scripts.pilot_decision.render_decision_document(phenomenon, predictor, per_dataset, examples) -> (md, decision, phenomenon_crits, predictor_crits)

decision_tree.PIVOT: phenomenon ✗ AND predictor untestable (no meaningful pairs)

smoke: test_pilot_smoke_synthetic — full A3->A6->A7 pipeline on the 200-mol fixture; runs in <60s on CPU

acceptance.select_pilot_pairs_smoke: 50 deterministic pairs (25 tox21 across within_nr/within_sr/cross_mechanism/random + 25 sider cross_soc)

deferred_for_full_pilot_run: outputs/analysis/pilot_decision.md — must be rendered after the full pilot pipeline (Stages 1–7 of scripts/launch_pilot.sh) finishes on Tox21 + SIDER. The rendering machinery and all sub-criteria are unit-tested; the document only requires that real measurement parquets be in place.
outputs/figures/pilot_figure_2_preview.pdf — depends on regional benefit data from Stage 5 of the pilot.
Random-partition null distribution (Stage 6, ~200 partitions × 2 datasets) — heaviest stage; expect ~30 GPU-hours of the ~40 GPU-hour pilot budget.

out_of_scope_observation.a7_does_not_advance_the_gate: A7 only writes pilot_decision.md. **Wave 4+ requires PI sign-off on that document before A8/A9 may begin.** The decision tree's `PROCEED` value is necessary but not sufficient — the human reviewer is the actual gate.
out_of_scope_observation.synthetic_fixture_delta_pair: On the 200-mol fixture, the test-only feature-leak channel makes both STL and MTL fit perfectly, collapsing Δ_pair to ~0. The smoke test exercises compute_region_deltas for the API contract and asserts the gradient-based S_pair detection on synthesised CIs. Δ_pair *recovery* on real chemistry runs through the launch_pilot.sh stage 5/7 wiring.

notes_for_wave4: A8 generalises pilot_baseline.py: the four feature columns (`G_ij`, `scaffold_tanimoto`, `embedding_distance`, `label_correlation`) are the seed for A8's full Phase 2 predictor, which adds incremental R² (plan §2.14). The friendly task-name → split-column mapping uses transfermtl.data.manifest.resolve_task_name.
criteria.py thresholds are locked; A8 must reference them (do not redefine).
scripts/launch_pilot.sh is the single entry point for the gate; A8/A9 should add their own stages downstream rather than fork the launcher.
